home.name: Carlos Araujo Galván
home.profileImageAlt: Profile picture of Carlos Araujo Galván

about.lead: Full Stack Web Developer & UX/UI Designer with +2 years of experience building modern, scalable web applications focused on improving the user experience.
about.frontend: For the Frontend and user experience design (UX/UI), I start by prototyping interfaces in Figma and build them with Angular or React (TypeScript), giving them their final style with Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap or native CSS. I take care of every detail so they are fast, accessible and adapt smoothly to any device.
about.backend: For the Backend I develop APIs and server-side logic with Node.js, Java (Spring Boot) or PHP (Laravel/Symfony), integrating relational (MySQL, PostgreSQL) and non-relational (MongoDB) databases to build complete end-to-end solutions.
about.philosophy: I uphold and apply clean code and best practices (SOLID, Clean Architecture), always working in agile environments with CI/CD workflows on Git/GitLab or GitHub and committing to continuous improvement and quality in every project.

bullets: Designed the prototypes for the internal web applications' interfaces (desktop, tablet and mobile) in Figma, optimizing the user experience (UX/UI).
Built the frontend in Angular (latest versions) with native CSS and Tailwind CSS, implementing new features and improving navigation for a smoother experience.
Built the backend in Java, ensuring correct record synchronization in PostgreSQL databases (managed with DBeaver).
Managed version control and branching on GitLab with Git, ensuring a collaborative workflow aligned with CI/CD.
Provided technical support for healthcare web applications, fixing critical bugs and tailoring solutions to each client's requirements.
Developed new features in Symfony (PHP), ensuring correct record synchronization in MySQL and PostgreSQL databases (managed with DBeaver).
Developed new features in Visual Basic 6.0 integrated into the web applications, with record synchronization in Oracle Database.
Managed version control and branching on GitLab with Git, ensuring a collaborative workflow aligned with CI/CD.
Built the frontend of the new internal website (desktop, tablet and mobile) in React (latest versions) and CSS3, applying the BEM methodology and accurately replicating the Figma prototypes.
Managed version control and branching on GitHub with Git, ensuring a collaborative workflow aligned with CI/CD.

reactPokedex.description: Interactive Pokédex built with React that consumes the PokeAPI to display real-time data, stats and abilities for each Pokémon.

reactWeatherMap.description: Weather app built with React that integrates external APIs to dynamically show the weather for any location.

angularRouting.description: Website built with Angular 17 to practice the framework's routing, services and forms.

footer.tagline: Full Stack Web Developer & UX/UI Designer crafting modern, accessible web experiences.
footer.letsTalkText: Have a project in mind? I'd be glad to help you bring it to life.
